title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 256.633 - Injunctions — attorney general to represent division
text:
256.633.  Injunctions — attorney general to represent division. — The division may petition a court of competent jurisdiction for injunctions or other appropriate relief to enforce the provisions of sections 256.600 to 256.640.  The attorney general shall represent the division when requested to do so.
(L. 1985 S.B. 281 § 11)
